languages.text: "Я хрономант Аматек Верный, подданный династии Нигилах, один из Смотрителей Музеона". {n}Он сверлит ваше лицо равнодушным взглядом, в котором чудится презрение.{/n} "Мой долг — всесторонне поддерживать сохранность экспозиции, оберегая ее от посягательств".

"I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."
languages.original_text: "Я хрономант Аматек Верный, подданный династии Нигилах, один из Смотрителей Музеона". {n}Он сверлит ваше лицо равнодушным взглядом, в котором чудится презрение.{/n} "Мой долг — всесторонне поддерживать сохранность экспозиции, оберегая ее от посягательств".

traits.locale_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

"I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

"I am Chronomancer Ramatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilah dynasty, Warden of the Museion." {n}He gives you a nasty look of contempt.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from external encroachment."

"I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

"I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

languages.text: 「私は忠実なる時魔法使いアマテク、ニヒラ朝臣、美術館の守護者である。」{n}彼はあなたに蔑むような冷たい視線を向ける。{/n}「私は可能な限り展示物を維持し、外部の侵害から守る義務がある」
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: 「私は忠実なる時魔法使いラマテク、ニヒラ朝臣、ミュージオンの守護者である。{n}彼はあなたに蔑むような冷たい視線を向ける。{/n}「私は可能な限り展示物を維持し、外部の侵害から守る義務がある。」
「私は忠実なる時魔法使いアマテク、ニヒラ朝臣、美術館の守護者である。」{n}彼はあなたに蔑むような冷たい視線を向ける。{/n}「私は可能な限り展示物を維持し、外部の侵害から守る義務がある」

languages.text: «Soy el Cronomante Amatekh el Fiel, vasallo de la dinastía Nihilakh, uno de los guardianes Museion». {n}Te mira con una indiferencia cargada de desprecio.{/n} «Es mi deber preservar la exposición en la medida de lo posible, protegiéndola contra cualquier intrusión».
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: «Soy el Cronomante Amatekh el Fiel, vasallo de la dinastía Nihilakh, uno de los guardianes Museion». {n}Te mira con una indiferencia cargada de desprecio.{/n} «Es mi deber preservar la exposición en la medida de lo posible, protegiéndola contra cualquier intrusión».

languages.text: “我是忠仆编时匠阿玛特克，尼希拉王朝的臣属，陈列馆的看守者。”{n}他冷漠地瞥了你一眼，那目光中透着毫不掩饰的轻蔑。{/n}“我的职责是尽一切可能维护展品完好，防止外部侵扰。”
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: “我是忠仆编时匠阿玛特克，尼希拉王朝的臣属，陈列馆的看守者。”{n}他冷漠地瞥了你一眼，那目光中透着毫不掩饰的轻蔑。{/n}“我的职责是尽一切可能维护展品完好，防止外部侵扰。”

languages.text: "Ich bin Chronomant Amatekh der Treue, Vassal der Nihilakh-Dynastie, einer der Wächter des Museions." {n}Er wirft dir einen gleichgültigen Blick zu, aber du spürst dennoch die Verachtung darin.{/n} "Es ist meine Pflicht, die Exponate nach Kräften zu pflegen und vor Übergriffen zu schützen."
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin Chronomant Amatekh der Treue, Vassal der Nihilakh-Dynastie, einer der Wächter des Museions." {n}Er wirft dir einen gleichgültigen Blick zu, aber du spürst dennoch die Verachtung darin.{/n} "Es ist meine Pflicht, die Exponate nach Kräften zu pflegen und vor Übergriffen zu schützen."

languages.text: "Ben Nihilah hanedanlığının vasalı, Museion Muhafızı Kronobaz Sadık Amatekh." {n}Sana kayıtsız bir bakış atsa da seni küçümsediğini hissedebiliyorsun.{/n} "Vazifem, sergilenen parçaları mümkün olan en geniş kapsamda muhafaza etmek ve onları ihlallerden korumaktır."
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Nihilah hanedanlığının vasalı, Museion Muhafızı Kronobaz Sadık Amatekh." {n}Sana kayıtsız bir bakış atsa da seni küçümsediğini hissedebiliyorsun.{/n} "Vazifem, sergilenen parçaları mümkün olan en geniş kapsamda muhafaza etmek ve onları ihlallerden korumaktır."

languages.text: « Je suis le chronomancien Amatekh le Fervent, vassal de la dynastie Nihilakh et gardien du Muséion. » {n}Il vous observe avec indifférence, mais vous percevez sans peine son dédain.{/n} « J'ai pour devoir de préserver les pièces exposées par tous les moyens, en les protégeant notamment de toute intrusion. »
languages.original_text: "I am Chronomancer Amatekh the Faithful, vassal of the Nihilakh dynasty, one of the Wardens of the Museion." {n}He gives you an indifferent look, yet you can still feel the contempt it carries.{/n} "It is my duty to maintain the exhibits to the fullest extent possible, safeguarding them from encroachment."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis le chronomancien Amatekh le Fervent, vassal de la dynastie Nihilakh et gardien du Muséion. » {n}Il vous observe avec indifférence, mais vous percevez sans peine son dédain.{/n} « J'ai pour devoir de préserver les pièces exposées par tous les moyens, en les protégeant notamment de toute intrusion. »
